### WORK INSTRUCTION – OUTBOUND – SCHEDULING THE PICK RELEASE

# **SCHEDULING THE DAILY PICK RELEASE**

To Schedule the Daily Pick Release, please follow the following steps.

**Step 1:** Using Oracle Forms with responsibility 'ZT US Warehouse Super User' or 'ZT US Master Warehouse Ops',

navigate to the 'Zebra Sales Order Pick Release' menu-option

Select the appropriate Organization (if prompted)

![](_page_0_Picture_8.jpeg)

**Step 2:** The Concurrent Request will be opened with the pop-up for the parameter selection

Enter the following details:

- Org Name: 'TX4' or 'TX5'
- Pick Release Submit (Y/N): 'Y'
- Frequency: 'TX4 Daily Standard' or 'TX5 Daily Standard'

Click on 'OK'

![](_page_0_Figure_15.jpeg)

**Step 3:** Click on the 'Schedule' button

![](_page_0_Figure_17.jpeg)

Document: WI - Outbound - Scheduling Pick Release v1.0.docx

Page 1 of 3 July 18, 2024

## **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION**

#### WORK INSTRUCTION – OUTBOUND – SCHEDULING THE PICK RELEASE

**Step 4:** Click the radio button for 'On Specific Days'

Enter the following details:

- Schedule Start Date & Time
- Schedule End Date & Time
- Months: Select 'All'
- Days of Every Week: Select 'Every'
- Days of Every Week: Select the Days

Click on 'OK' again.

**Step 5:** Click on the 'Options' button

Under 'Notify the following people' select the names of the people you want to be notified, by clicking in the field and searching for the right person

![](_page_1_Picture_13.jpeg)

Click on 'OK' again.

![](_page_1_Picture_15.jpeg)

![](_page_1_Figure_16.jpeg)

![](_page_1_Figure_17.jpeg)

Page 2 of 3 July 18, 2024

![](_page_2_Picture_0.jpeg)

## **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION**

#### WORK INSTRUCTION – OUTBOUND – SCHEDULING THE PICK RELEASE

**Step 6:** Click on the 'Submit' button

![](_page_2_Picture_4.jpeg)

![](_page_2_Picture_5.jpeg)

The Pick Release is now scheduled to run automatically on the dates/days specified

Page 3 of 3 July 18, 2024
